MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Schnur for Celina Carleton; Mitchell Chyette and Martha Daetwyler for Kathleen Wein.

Counsel stipulated to mediation. The Motion to Compel Arbitration (currently set for hearing on September 18, 2007) and today's Petition to Enforce the Terms of the Trust were both continued to November 19, 2007.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Bailiff: Saephan; Clerks: R. Michael Diles and C. Joy Guandique.
